allow: Bash(node -e "const lr = require\(''''lucide-react''''\); const names = Object.keys\(lr\).filter\(k => typeof lr[k] === ''''object'''' && lr[k].displayName\); console.log\(names.filter\(n => n.toLowerCase\(\).includes\(''''instagram''''\) || n.toLowerCase\(\).includes\(''''shirt''''\) || n.toLowerCase\(\).includes\(''''flame''''\) || n.toLowerCase\(\).includes\(''''webhook''''\) || n.toLowerCase\(\).includes\(''''pie''''\) || n.toLowerCase\(\).includes\(''''layers''''\) || n.toLowerCase\(\).includes\(''''globe''''\) || n.toLowerCase\(\).includes\(''''send''''\) || n.toLowerCase\(\).includes\(''''at-sign''''\)\).join\(''''\\n''''\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const lr = require\(''lucide-react''\); const names = Object.keys\(lr\).filter\(k => !k.includes\(''Icon''\) && !k.startsWith\(''Lucide''\) && typeof lr[k] === ''object''\); console.log\(names.filter\(n => /^\(Send|AtSign|Webhook|Shirt\)$/.test\(n\)\).join\(''\\n''\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const lr = require\(''lucide-react''\); const names = Object.keys\(lr\).filter\(k => !k.includes\(''Icon''\) && !k.startsWith\(''Lucide''\) && typeof lr[k] === ''object''\); console.log\(names.filter\(n => /share|social|megaphone|hash|sparkle|rss|users|landmark/i.test\(n\)\).join\(''\\n''\)\)")
